name: Evt Limited
analysis: EVT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$12.9700, stop A$11.6325, target A$16.9825 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
